## Task Overview
Brief description of the development work required.

## Technical Scope
- **Component(s)**: Which React components need work?
- **Data Layer**: New data structures or API changes needed?
- **Styling**: CSS/styling work required?
- **Testing**: What testing is needed?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Functional requirement 1
- [ ] Functional requirement 2
- [ ] Performance requirement (< 2s load time)
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] Print-friendly (if applicable)
- [ ] Accessibility compliant (WCAG AA)

## Technical Requirements
### Dependencies
- [ ] New libraries needed: ___
- [ ] Existing component modifications
- [ ] Data migration required

### Performance Considerations
- [ ] Lazy loading implementation
- [ ] Asset optimization
- [ ] Offline functionality
- [ ] Local storage usage

### Design System Integration
- [ ] Duotone color palette application
- [ ] Typography system compliance
- [ ] Component pattern consistency

## Implementation Notes
Any specific technical guidance, architecture decisions, or implementation details.

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code implemented and tested
- [ ] Unit tests written (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-browser testing completed
- [ ] Mobile testing completed
- [ ] Print testing completed
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 4 hours)
- [ ] Medium (4-16 hours) 
- [ ] Large (16+ hours)
- [ ] Epic (requires breakdown)

## Dependencies
List any other issues or tasks that must be completed first.
